_comment: Canonical tri-state PATCH wire contract, shared by the server round-trip test (server/.../PatchWireContractTest.kt) and every backend SDK's parity test. expectedBody is the EXACT JSON an SDK must emit for the described caller intent: a key absent => leave unchanged, key:null => clear, key:value => set. Metadata bags are 2-state at the field level (omit vs object); a null-valued key INSIDE a bag deletes that key. statuses (non-nullable optional) must be omitted when unset, never sent as null. Do not weaken without versioning to server-v2. See docs/sdk-tristate-parity.md.

fixtures.name: update_leave_all
fixtures.description: All fields omitted -> empty body -> user unchanged.

fixtures.name: update_set_first_name
fixtures.description: firstName set to a value; lastName left untouched.

fixtures.name: update_clear_last_name
fixtures.description: lastName cleared via explicit null; firstName left untouched.

fixtures.name: update_set_and_clear
fixtures.description: firstName set, lastName cleared, locale left untouched in one PATCH.

fixtures.name: update_metadata_merge
fixtures.description: unsafeMetadata bag present -> deep-merges; existing keys preserved.

fixtures.name: update_metadata_delete_key
fixtures.description: A null-valued key inside the bag deletes that key (tri-state lives INSIDE the bag, the bag itself is 2-state).

fixtures.name: metadata_public_only
fixtures.description: Only publicMetadata supplied; other bags left untouched.

fixtures.name: metadata_delete_key
fixtures.description: Null-valued key deletes within the public bag; sibling key survives.

fixtures.name: search_empty_omits_statuses
fixtures.description: No filters -> empty body. CRITICAL: statuses (non-nullable optional) MUST be omitted, never sent as null (the server rejects null statuses).

fixtures.name: search_clear_name_filter
fixtures.description: name explicitly null -> filter for users with no name (search name is tri-state on the server).

fixtures.name: search_statuses
fixtures.description: statuses filter present with one value.

fixtures.name: create_minimal
fixtures.description: Only email supplied; metadata bags omitted (non-nullable optional, default empty server-side).
